createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created

creatorUid.description: The UID of the user who created the event

creatorLatitude.description: Geographical coordinate latitude of the creator at event creation

creatorLongitude.description: Geographical coordinate longitude of the creator at event creation

requireGender.description: Whether to require attendees to state their gender

requireMatricNumber.description: Whether to require attendees to state their class matriculation number

requireGeolocation.description: Whether to require geolocation verification for attendance

customQuestion.description: An optional custom text question to request from attendees

customQuestion2.description: A second optional custom text question to request from attendees

customQuestion3.description: A third optional custom text question to request from attendees

creatorName.description: Name of the event host, instructor, or creator

adminKey.title: Admin Key
adminKey.description: Secure secret mapping for event administration
Secret key used to authorize administration of the event

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this mapping was created

eventAdmin.title: Event Admin Registration
eventAdmin.description: An authorized admin user session for a specific event

adminKey.description: The admin key that was supplied to authorize this user

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when the user became an authorized admin

attendee.title: Attendee
attendee.description: An attendee checked into an event

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the attendee checked in

latitude.description: Geographical coordinate latitude of attendee at check-in

longitude.description: Geographical coordinate longitude of attendee at check-in

matricNumber.description: The matriculation number of the attendee

customResponse.description: The attendee's answer to the custom question

customResponse2.description: The attendee's answer to the second custom question

customResponse3.description: The attendee's answer to the third custom question

deviceId.description: Unique device identifier generated in local storage to track multiple check-ins from the same device

/admin_keys/{eventId}.description: Secure mapping containing the administration key

/events/{eventId}/admins/{userId}.description: Users who are registered admins for this event
